strengths: Nearly 20 years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — well exceeds the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work and MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling, demonstrating active engagement with agentic AI development
Founder/open-source entrepreneur (GISCollective) and community educator (FOSS4G talk, multiple workshops) show initiative and knowledge-sharing beyond standard IC scope
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and limited in demonstrated scale — meaningful AI work begins only in April 2025, well short of 'recognized expertise with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'
No evidence of director-level IC behaviors: strategic customer advisory, cross-organizational influence, or shaping product/platform roadmaps at the level this role requires
Educational background (BS in CS, BA in Fine Arts) does not include the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and no equivalent research credentials are present
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, broadly experienced engineer with genuine entrepreneurial instincts and an active interest in AI tooling, but the role is a director-level strategic IC position requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated ability to advise customers, shape cloud-AI platform strategy, and inspire cross-organizational action — none of which are evidenced in the resume; his AI engagement is too recent and narrow to satisfy the core differentiator of this position, and his career arc reflects deep craft-level individual contribution rather than the strategic influence the role demands.
